name: Impossible Turkey Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Grease a pie plate, 10 x 1.5 inches.
3. Sprinkle turkey, mushrooms, onions, salt, and cheese in the pie plate.
4. Beat remaining ingredients until smooth: 15 seconds in a blender on high speed or 1 minute with a hand beater.
5. Pour the mixture into the pie plate.
6. Bake until golden brown and a knife inserted halfway between the center and edge comes out clean, 30 to 35 minutes.
7. Let stand for 5 minutes before cutting.
8. Refrigerate any remaining pie. Serves 6 to 8.
Impossible Ham Pie: Substitute 2 cups cut-up fully cooked smoked ham for the turkey.
High Altitude Directions (3,500 to 6,500 feet): Bake for 35 to 40 minutes.
